    misc/py-emoji: update to 2.12.1

    - update to 2.12.1
    - switch to pep517
    - allow package build with setuptools < 65
    - take up maintainership

    emoji > 2.7.0 is required for newer version of net-im/gajim

    PR:             279660
    Approved by:    kevans (maintainer)
